app.kicker: TU/e · Library & Information Services · AI Enablement Program
app.lede: Seven dimensions, four levels, one figure — a self-assessment instrument for LIS, rendered as an interactive publication plate.

landing.heading: Where does AI literacy stand, here, today?
landing.body: Complete a short self-assessment against the seven dimensions to produce a profile. Share the file with your team lead or keep it private — nothing leaves your browser unless you export it.

notes.time.title: Time
notes.time.body: Ten minutes. Honest beats complete — pick the anchor that sounds most like you right now.
notes.privacy.title: Privacy
notes.privacy.body: No accounts, no tracking, no server. Your answers live in this browser tab until you choose to download them.
notes.export.title: What you get out
notes.export.body: A JSON file you can keep or share, and a typeset PNG of the heptagon plate for reports and slides.

citation.label: Based on
citation.body: Hackl, V., Müller, A. E., & Sailer, M. (2025). The AI Literacy Heptagon: A Structured Approach to AI Literacy in Higher Education.
citation.note: The seven dimensions, four Bloom-aligned levels, and the baseline concept used here are adopted directly from the paper's Heptagon framework (Figure 3, Table 3). This tool is an implementation aid built by the TU/e LIS AI Literacy Team; it is not affiliated with the authors.

scope.individual.title: About you
scope.individual.body: Optional. The name is kept only on the exported file; the rest helps the aggregator place your profile in the org.
scope.team.title: About the team
scope.team.body: A team profile is either filled by the lead on behalf of the team, or computed later by importing individual exports in the aggregator.
scope.field.name: Name

assess.question: Which statement best describes the current level for {{dimension}}?
assess.evidence.label: Evidence (optional)
assess.evidence.placeholder: What are you thinking of? One line is enough.

results.heading: Your profile
results.body: Below is the heptagon you just described. Dimensions that sit inside the terracotta baseline band are below the Beginner level LIS expects from every staff member.

aggregator.lede: Drop in the JSON profiles your team has exported. Everything is computed in your browser — no profile ever leaves this tab.
aggregator.drop.hint: One or more heptagon JSON exports. Files that don't match the schema are flagged and skipped.
aggregator.children.empty: No profiles at this level yet.
aggregator.drilldownHint: Click a card to drill down.
aggregator.validation.heading: Files skipped
aggregator.compare.hint: Click up to three cards to overlay them.
aggregator.compare.tooFew: Select at least two cards to compare.

figure.caption.title: Figure 1 — Profile of the Information Literacy & Education team.

margin.reading.title: Reading the plate
margin.reading.body: Seven axes, one per dimension. Four concentric rings: Unaware, Beginner, Intermediate, Expert. The terracotta band marks the Beginner baseline expected of every LIS member.
margin.profile.title: The profile
margin.profile.body: The red polygon is the team's current self-assessment. Where a vertex dips below the terracotta band, the dimension is below baseline — the marginalia on the plate calls it out.
margin.interaction.title: Interaction
margin.interaction.body: Hover any vertex for the Bloom-aligned anchor text. Export as JSON or a typeset PNG plate.

technical.beginner: Identifies and explains basic principles, functions, and mechanisms of AI systems.
technical.intermediate: Applies and analyzes AI algorithms and data processing techniques in practical scenarios.
technical.expert: Evaluates, develops, and optimizes advanced AI solutions and computational processes.

application.beginner: Recognizes and describes basic AI applications.
application.intermediate: Implements and adapts AI technologies to solve practical problems effectively.
application.expert: Critically evaluates and strategically designs innovative AI applications.

criticalThinking.unaware: Not aware of AI implications or limitations.
criticalThinking.beginner: Recognizes and explains basic capabilities and limitations of AI systems.
criticalThinking.intermediate: Analyzes and critically assesses AI suitability for specific contexts.
criticalThinking.expert: Thoroughly evaluates AI systems and proposes advanced solutions to emerging issues.

integration.unaware: No ability to incorporate AI technologies into personal or professional digital environments.
integration.beginner: Recognizes and describes basic opportunities for integrating AI solutions across various contexts.
integration.intermediate: Implements and analyzes integration strategies, adapts AI solutions to different contexts, and responds to technological change.
integration.expert: Evaluates complex integration scenarios, designs innovative AI integrations, and develops adaptive strategies for incorporating new AI developments.

legal.unaware: No awareness of legal frameworks concerning AI.
legal.beginner: Recalls and understands fundamental legal and regulatory frameworks governing AI.
legal.intermediate: Applies and analyzes regulatory implications in specific AI scenarios.
legal.expert: Evaluates legal risks comprehensively and designs guidelines compliant with evolving AI regulations.

ethical.unaware: Not aware of ethical implications related to AI.
ethical.beginner: Recognizes and explains ethical principles relevant to AI.
ethical.intermediate: Applies ethical principles and analyzes ethical implications in specific AI scenarios.
ethical.expert: Evaluates complex ethical challenges and formulates standards for ethical AI development and use.

socialImpact.unaware: Not aware of societal impacts of AI technologies.
socialImpact.beginner: Recognizes and explains basic social impacts of AI on human interaction and work environments.
socialImpact.intermediate: Assesses and analyzes how AI technologies influence society and social structures.
socialImpact.expert: Evaluates complex societal impacts, anticipates future consequences, and develops strategies for responsible AI integration.

heptagon.title: AI Literacy Profile
heptagon.desc.intro: A radar-like figure with seven axes. Profile levels:
